name: Oriental Meatballs Crunch
recipeIngredient: 2 Tablespoons soy sauce, low sodium, to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the waterchestnuts and chop them.
2. Beat 1 egg with milk in a bowl. Add ground beef, chopped onions, chili sauce, soy sauce, and crushed waterchestnuts. Mix well to combine.
3. Form the mixture into balls.
4. Beat the remaining egg with 2 tablespoons of water in another bowl.
5. Dip each meatball in the egg mixture, then roll them in crushed noodles.
6. Fry the meatballs in hot fat until they are golden brown.
Recipe can be doubled.
